news.title: Gold vs Nifty 50: Which investment created more wealth over the past 10 years?
news.description: The analysis shows gold has significantly outperformed the Nifty 50 over the short term, particularly in the last one to five years. Over 10 years, both gold and the Nifty 50 have delivered broadly similar long-term returns.
